title: polygala sinaica
intro: Polygala sinaica is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family, commonly known as the milkwort family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala sinaica include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Carbohydrate polymers", polygala sinaica benefits include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can inhibit pro-inflammatory cytokines (TNF-α, IL-1β) and alleviate lung injury.
